svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="J4rOrjZ5uEIYS-cAwV19"> <mxGraphModel dx="791" dy="1091" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
!theme materia
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

title <b>Class Diagram</b>

class User {
 +userId: String
 +name: String
 +email: String
}

class Contract {
 +contractId: String
 +fileName: String
 +uploadedAt: Date
}

class Chunk {
 +chunkId: String
 +text: String
}

class Embedding {
 +embeddingId: String
 +vector: float[]
}

class Summary {
 +summaryText: String
}

class RiskReport {
 +riskScore: double
}

class AIService {
 +generateEmbedding()
 +retrieveChunks()
 +generateResponse()
}

User --> Contract
Contract --> Chunk
Chunk --> Embedding
Contract --> Summary
Contract --> RiskReport
AIService --> Chunk

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="s31tFLLTC1g4qOQDU-kv-3"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="871" width="535" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
